# SettleWire

> Prediction markets news, contextualized. We cluster coverage of each event
> from 90+ outlets, credit the first reporter, and add original analysis of
> why it matters for traders, operators, and regulation watchers. All article
> text is our own original writing; every story links to its primary source.

## Sections
- [Front page](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/index.html)
- [Story archive](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/all.html): every story, searchable
- [The Docket](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/events.html): upcoming court dates, earnings, deadlines
- [RSS feed](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/rss.xml)

## Latest stories
- [Ninth Circuit hears Kalshi tribal gaming classification dispute](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/ninth-circuit-hears-kalshi-tribal-gaming-classification-dispute.html): The Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals took up a legal challenge examining whether Kalshi's event contracts constitute tribal gaming activity, in a case with sweeping implications for prediction market regulation.
- [Gibraltar launches world's first dedicated prediction markets regulatory framework](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/gibraltar-launches-world-s-first-dedicated-prediction-markets-regulatory-framewo.html): Gibraltar became the first jurisdiction globally to establish a standalone regulatory regime exclusively for prediction markets, creating a bespoke licensing framework separate from existing gambling or financial-services rules.
- [Polymarket 'ROCKY' referral code extended through MLB All-Star Game](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-rocky-referral-code-extended-through-mlb-all-star-game.html): Polymarket has extended its $50 referral promotion using code 'ROCKY' through the MLB All-Star Game, according to Rocky Top Insider.
- [Tribal gaming leader warns prediction markets threaten sovereign casino revenues](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/tribal-gaming-leader-warns-prediction-markets-threaten-sovereign-casino-revenues.html): James Siva, a tribal gaming advocate, warned in a Tribal Business News Q&A that the rapid expansion of regulated prediction markets poses a direct competitive threat to Native American tribal casino operations.
- [Kalshi disputes think tank claims users lose millions to pro traders](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-disputes-think-tank-claims-users-lose-millions-to-pro-traders.html): Kalshi is publicly contesting allegations from a think tank asserting that retail users suffer significant losses when trading against professional market makers on the prediction platform.
- [Kalshi-Spotify Partnership Collapses in Public Dispute](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-spotify-partnership-collapses-in-public-dispute.html): Prediction markets platform Kalshi and Spotify ended their promotional partnership in a messy, public falling-out, according to a Garbage Day report published recently.
- [Kalshi legitimacy guide targets new prediction market users in 2026](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-legitimacy-guide-targets-new-prediction-market-users-in-2026.html): MLive.com published a consumer explainer in 2026 assessing whether Kalshi is safe and legitimate, aimed at first-time prediction market participants considering the regulated U.S. exchange.
- [Corporate Crackdown Targets Prediction Markets Amid Explosive Growth](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/corporate-crackdown-targets-prediction-markets-amid-explosive-growth.html): Prediction markets are experiencing rapid expansion in 2025, but companies and institutions have begun restricting employee participation, signaling a new wave of corporate resistance to the sector, according to Inc.com.
- [Kalshi Expands Perpetual Contracts as World Cup Markets Set Volume Records](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-expands-perpetual-contracts-as-world-cup-markets-set-volume-records.html): Kalshi has launched an expanded perpetuals product line while World Cup event contracts have driven prediction-market trading volumes to new highs, according to TradingView.
- [Midterm Election Contracts Top $200M in Prediction Market Volume](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/midterm-election-contracts-top-200m-in-prediction-market-volume.html): Traders on prediction markets have collectively wagered nearly $200 million on 2026 U.S. midterm election outcomes, according to NBC News.
